name: Gliding over Dunes
description: Glide the ball over the dunes, unlock new maps and images, set new records. Exciting challenges await you! An exciting and captivating game in which you have to glide a ball over the dunes. Playing it is incredibly easy and fun, but youll have to work hard to become a professional!
instructions: 1 Tap on the screen and hold to accelerate 2 Release the screen to take off 3 Hold the screen in flight to dive down
